xpath.attribute: not user_has_group_tti_enable_so_price or locked or hide_lock_btns
Do you want to cancel this sale order?

button.name: action_update_sale_order
button.invisible: locked or not tti_lims_api_response_check or state in ['cancel']

button.name: action_cancel
button.confirm: Do you want to cancel this sale order?
button.invisible: state not in ['sent_to_lims'] or not id or locked

xpath.attribute: Type to find a test / package...
Type to find a test / package...

field.name: product_template_id
field.context: {'partner_id': parent.partner_id, 'quantity': product_uom_qty, 'pricelist': parent.pricelist_id, 'uom':product_uom, 'company_id': parent.company_id, 'default_list_price': price_unit, 'default_uom_id': product_uom, }
field.placeholder: Type to find a test / package...

field.name: tti_si_sub_category
field.placeholder: Type to find a sub category
